title: DragonHealthPlugin
description: A simple and lightweight Minecraft plugin for Paper servers that allows you to customize the Ender Dragon's health.
body:
# 🐉 Make the Ender Dragon Fight Epic Again!

Tired of the Ender Dragon being too easy? This lightweight plugin lets you customize the dragon's health to create more challenging and longer ender dragon fights!

## ✨ Features

- 🎯 **Fully Customizable** - Set dragon health to any value (default 600 HP vs normal 200 HP)
- ⚡ **Zero Lag** - Lightweight with no performance impact
- 🔄 **Works Everywhere** - Natural spawns AND respawned dragons
- 🛠️ **Live Reload** - Change settings without restarting your server
- 🎮 **Easy Setup** - Works immediately with simple configuration

## 🎮 Perfect For

- **Survival servers** wanting more challenge
- **Server owners** who want epic end-game content

## 📋 Commands

- **/dragonhealth** - Check the Ender Dragon's current health
- **/dragonhealth reload** - Apply config changes instantly

Transform your server's end-game experience with just one plugin! 🚀

## ⚙️ Simple Configuration

```yaml
dragon-health: 600.0  # Default is 200
